name: fromAll
source: fromAll().when({ $init() { return {}; }, Ping(s, e) { return s; } })

name: fromStream
source: fromStream("orders").when({ $init() { return {}; }, Ping(s, e) { return s; } })

name: fromStreams with array
source: fromStreams(["a", "b"]).when({ $init() { return {}; }, Ping(s, e) { return s; } })

name: fromStreams with varargs
source: fromStreams("a", "b").when({ $init() { return {}; }, Ping(s, e) { return s; } })

name: fromCategory
source: fromCategory("orders").when({ $init() { return {}; }, Ping(s, e) { return s; } })

name: fromCategories with array
source: fromCategories(["orders", "invoices"]).when({ $init() { return {}; }, Ping(s, e) { return s; } })

name: fromCategories with varargs
source: fromCategories("orders", "invoices").when({ $init() { return {}; }, Ping(s, e) { return s; } })

name: foreachStream from all
source: fromAll().foreachStream().when({ $init() { return {}; }, Ping(s, e) { return s; } })

name: partitionBy
source: fromAll().partitionBy(function(e) { return e.data.region; }).when({ $init() { return {}; }, Ping(s, e) { return s; } })

name: multiple event types in when
source: fromAll().when({ $init() { return {}; }, OrderPlaced(s, e) { return s; }, OrderShipped(s, e) { return s; }, OrderCancelled(s, e) { return s; } })

name: includeLinks option
source: options({ $includeLinks: true }); fromAll().when({ $init() { return {}; }, Ping(s, e) { return s; } })

name: reorderEvents option
source: options({ reorderEvents: true, processingLag: 500 }); fromStreams(["a", "b"]).when({ $init() { return {}; }, Ping(s, e) { return s; } })

name: biState option
source: options({ biState: true }); fromAll().when({ $init() { return {}; }, $initShared() { return {}; }, Ping(s, e) { return s; } })
